# Architecture Rules

## Layer Structure
- **API / Entry** — HTTP controllers, CLI commands, event handlers
- **Application** — Use cases, orchestration, DTOs
- **Domain** — Business logic, entities, value objects, domain events
- **Infrastructure** — Database, external APIs, file system, messaging

## Dependency Rule
Dependencies flow **inward only**: API -> Application -> Domain <- Infrastructure.
Domain has zero external dependencies.

## Project Organization
- Group by bounded context or feature, not by technical layer
- Keep modules cohesive — one concern per module
- Shared utilities go in a dedicated `shared/` or `utils/` directory

## Interface Segregation
- Define interfaces in the domain layer
- Implement in infrastructure
- Inject via constructor (dependency inversion)
